word: H6549 - פַּרְעֹה נְכֹה - Parʻôh Nᵉkôh - par-o' nek-o' - Pharaoh-necho

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרעה נכו פּרעה נכה

Transliteration: par‛ôh nekôh par‛ôh nekô

Phonetic: par-o' nek-o'

BDB Definition:

Pharaoh-necho = "great house-he is smitten"
  1. the Pharaoh of Egypt who fought king Josiah of Judah at Megiddo and killed him

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
